commands.review_summary:
The PR disables pi-coding-agent retry for prepared embedded Pi settings, updates the corresponding settings test expectation, and adds an Unreleased changelog fix entry.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main prepares embedded Pi settings without disabling retry, while pi-coding-agent 0.75.3 defaults agent retry to enabled and retries by removing the assistant error before continuing. I did not run a live Feishu/Qwen replay loop in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: No repair job is needed; with no blocking findings, the automerge lane can rely on exact-head checks and maintainer acceptance of the retry-owner change.

target.title: fix(agents): disable pi-coding-agent auto-retry to prevent tool call replay loops
